title: Associate Performance Marketing Specialist (Digital Marketing I Fashion I Retail)
description:
• MNC

  • Basic $ 4,500 - $5,200 + AWS + Variable Bonus

  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career Progression

  • Working location: Tai Seng

  • Working Days: Monday – Friday

  • Working Hours: 9am – 6pm


Job Responsibilities:

  • Take end-to-end ownership of performance marketing campaigns across Paid Search, Display, Programmatic and Paid Social channels, ensuring alignment with growth objectives

  • Plan and execute A/B testing, alongside exploring new platforms to embark on for paid performance efforts

  • Formulate performance marketing strategies that align with business goals and KPIs

  • Set and achieve quantifiable goals for all paid marketing activities to track and measure success

  • Plan and review budgets to ensure efficient ad spend across various channels, optimizing ROI

  • Collaborate with partner agencies and other internal teams to create consistent and aligned communications across all channels

  • Stay abreast of emerging digital tools, platforms, and trends to diversify and optimize the channel mix and identify new opportunities

  • Conduct research on market trends, brand's target audiences, and competitors to drive awareness, engagement, and conversions

  • Analyse reports and web traffic data to map the customer journey, identify trends, and make data-driven decisions

  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders to align efforts and achieve shared marketing goals

  • Explore possibilities of business expansions into new markets with performance marketing efforts

  • Work closely with stakeholders of various markets to explore opportunities of growth and scaling up, ensuring that KPIs are achieved

  • Will be interacting with external agencies to ensure hygiene and best practices are executed and aligned with brand guidelines


Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing or related fields

  • Minimum 3-4 years of digital agency, digital marketing or ECommerce marketing

  • Prior experience in the retail / fashion industry would be a plus

  • Prior experience in expansion into markets with performance marketing, would be a plus

  • Experience with Google Analytics, Google Adwords, Programmatic, Paid Social advertising platforms, Microsoft and Affiliates (advantage if have)

  • Experience with data analysis and a data driven environment


Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities

  • Current and Expected salary

  • Reason for leaving

  • Date of availability

  • Education background


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

THIEN CHING MEI (R2198032)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
